details.question: combien d'utilisateur a t'on dans la base
details.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NB_UTILISATEURS FROM DISTINCT DBUSERNAME;
issues: Ne compte pas les utilisateurs distincts

Échec exécution Oracle: ORA-00903: invalid table name
Help: https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00903/

details.question: Qui s'est connecté aujourd'hui ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='LOGON' AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)=TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;

details.question: Qui s'est déconnecté aujourd'hui ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='LOGOFF' AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)=TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;

details.question: Montre-moi les 5 personnes qui ont fait le plus d'actions sur les 7 derniers jours.
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-7) GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Quelles sont les 5 tables les plus utilisées cette semaine ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-7) GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Y a-t-il eu des créations de comptes sur les 30 derniers jours ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, ACTION_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP, OBJECT_NAME FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME IN ('CREATE USER','ALTER USER','DELETE USER') AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-30) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;
issues: Action invalide DELETE USER au lieu de DROP/CREATE USER

details.question: Y a-t-il eu des suppressions de comptes sur les 30 derniers jours ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, ACTION_NAME, OBJECT_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME IN ('DROP USER','ALTER USER','CREATE USER') AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-30) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;

details.question: Qui a modifié des droits récemment ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, OBJECT_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='GRANT' ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Quel poste a été le plus actif ce mois-ci ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP,'MM')=TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM') GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;
issues: N'utilise pas USERHOST pour une question de poste

details.question: Donne les 10 dernières actions enregistrées.
details.sql: SELECT ID, EVENT_TIMESTAMP, DBUSERNAME, ACTION_NAME, OBJECT_NAME FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Sur les 48 dernières heures, quels objets ont le plus changé ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE-7) GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Pour l'utilisateur SYS, montre les 5 dernières actions.
details.sql: SELECT EVENT_TIMESTAMP, ACTION_NAME, OBJECT_NAME, TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP) FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE DBUSERNAME='SYS' ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Qui a fait la toute dernière action dans les traces ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, ACTION_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)=TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Combien d'actions au total ont été enregistrées hier ?
details.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)=TRUNC(SYSDATE-1);

details.question: Quels sont les 3 objets les plus modifiés ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY;
